# API CONTRACTS — A Million Plateaus

## 1. mp-wasm JavaScript API

```typescript
// Generated by wasm-bindgen from mp-wasm crate

interface WasmGraph {
    add_plateau(id: string, name: string, e1: number, e2: number, e3: number): void
    add_bridge(from_id: string, to_id: string, concept: string, grade: number): void
    plateau(id: string): PlateauDto | null
    reachable_plateaus(wizard_rep_json: string): string[]   // array of PlateauIds
    is_reachable(plateau_id: string, wizard_rep_json: string): boolean
    save(): Uint8Array       // serialize to bincode
    load(bytes: Uint8Array): void
}

interface PlateauDto {
    id:          string
    name:        string
    description: string
    position:    { e1: number, e2: number, e3: number }
}
```

---

## 2. Alebrije Service REST API

```
POST /alebrije/ask
Content-Type: application/json

Request:
{
    plateau_id:           string,
    wizard_traversals:    [{ plateau_name: string, depth: number }],
    alebrije_name:        string,
    alebrije_components:  string[],        // ["Owl", "Octopus"]
    user_message:         string,
    conversation_history: [{ role: "user"|"assistant", content: string }]
}

Response 200:
{
    reply:            string,              // alebrije voice response, max 256 tokens
    suggested_plateaus: string[]           // 0-3 nearby plateau names hinted at
}

Response 429: rate limited
Response 500: Claude API error
```

---

## 3. Multiplayer Server REST API

```
GET /wizards/:domainId/top?limit=10
Response: [{ wizard_id, handle, reputation_grade, scalar_score }]

GET /plateaus/:plateauId/presence
Response: [{ wizard_id, handle, alebrije_name, position: {x,y,z} }]

POST /resources/:resourceId/vote
Body: { wizard_id, weight, signature }
Response: { new_weighted_count, state: ResourceState }
```

---

## 4. Colyseus Room Messages

```typescript
// PlateauRoom schema
interface PlateauRoomState {
    plateau_id: string
    wizards: Map<string, WizardPresence>
}

interface WizardPresence {
    wizard_id:     string
    handle:        string
    alebrije_name: string
    position:      { x: number, y: number, z: number }
}

// Client → Server messages
type ClientMessage =
    | { type: "MOVE";        position: {x,y,z} }
    | { type: "PLACE_STONE"; resource_id: string }
    | { type: "TRAIL_MARK";  position: {x,y,z}; text: string }

// Server → Client messages (Colyseus state patches — automatic)
```

---

## 5. CRDT Sync Protocol (Gun.js relay)

```
Node key structure:
  plateaus/{plateau_id}    → PlateauNode JSON
  bridges/{bridge_id}      → Bridge JSON
  resources/{resource_id}  → Resource JSON
  votes/{resource_id}/{wizard_id} → number (grow-only)

Sync:
  Client subscribes to plateaus/* → receives all plateau updates
  Client puts plateau → relayed to all connected peers
  Automerge changes serialized as base64, stored at:
    crdt/changes/{change_hash} → base64 encoded Automerge change
```
